blocks.text: Sørloth's hat-trick sends Atlético through — Norway's greatest CL night
Alexander Sørloth was unstoppable — three goals, one statement night. Norway's striker carries Atlético into the Champions League quarter-finals and cements his place among Europe's elite.
🎮 13:00 — rain (100 Thieves) vs MANA in DraculaN Season 5, Norwegian CS2 honour at stake
